thought.text: I see the issue - there are duplicate rules in the lexer file. Let me remove them:

reasoning_content:
We are seeing duplicate definitions in the lexer grammar. Specifically, we have two definitions for:
 - IdentifierNondigit (lines 109 and 119)
 - Nondigit (lines 114 and 124)
 - Digit (lines 97 and 129)
 - Constant (lines 50 and 133)
 - IntegerConstant (lines 55 and 138)
 - DecimalConstant (lines 62 and 144)
 - OctalConstant (lines 67 and 149)
 - NonzeroDigit (lines 82 and 155)
 - OctalDigit (lines 87 and 160)

 We must remove the duplicate definitions that appear after the first occurrence.

 The duplicate section starts at line 118 and goes until line 162.

 We'll remove the entire duplicate section (lines 118 to 162) because it is redundant and causing errors.

action.old_str:
fragment
IdentifierNondigit

    ;

fragment

    ;

fragment
IdentifierNondigit

    ;

fragment

    ;

fragment

Constant

    ;

fragment
IntegerConstant
    :   DecimalConstant
    |   OctalConstant
    ;

fragment
DecimalConstant
    :   NonzeroDigit Digit*
    ;

fragment
OctalConstant
    :   '0' OctalDigit*
    ;


fragment
NonzeroDigit
    :   [1-9]
    ;

fragment
OctalDigit
    :   [0-7]
    ;
